name: Northbeam
description: Northbeam — Multi-touch marketing attribution platform aggregating ad spend data for DTC e-commerce brands.

seo.title: Northbeam — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Northbeam: Northbeam — Multi-touch marketing attribution platform aggregating ad spend data for DTC e-commerce brands.

when_to_use: Multi-touch attribution for a DTC brand across paid channels
Centralizing ad spend data from Meta, Google, and TikTok
Marketing mix optimization using Northbeam attribution model
Real-time ROAS tracking across channels for media buyers
Cross-channel spend analysis replacing siloed ad dashboards

pros: Aggregates Meta, Google, TikTok spend cleanly
Strong customer support for ecommerce ops
cons: Overlap with Triple Whale makes choice unclear
Attribution still a best-guess, not truth
review.verdict: Top-tier DTC attribution if your spend justifies the cost; overkill for brands under $1M/yr ad spend.
review.best_for: DTC brands spending $100k+/month on paid ads
review.not_for: Small shops with modest ad budgets and simple funnels
